input.headline: Risk of blizzards and schools shut during amber weather warning - and 25cm of snow could fall

raw.headline: Risk of blizzards and schools shut during amber weather warning - and 25cm of snow could fall

winner: Why did the school pencil refuse to go outside during the blizzard? It was afraid it might get lost in the wood-storm.

candidates.text: Why did the teacher bring a shovel to school? Because they heard there was a chance of 25 centimeters of homework!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on '25cm of snow' and 'homework,' but the connection between a shovel and homework feels slightly forced."}

candidates.text: Why did the school close down for a blizzard when they usually keep their doors open even during heavy storms? Because this time it was an amber warning... and apparently they take yellow snow very seriously!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on 'yellow snow' and the amber weather warning, but the setup could be tighter for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Why did the teacher take a snow day off? Because she heard there was going to be 25 centimeters of school closure!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke plays on 'snow day' and 'school closure,' but the pun is somewhat forced and the humor is mild. It meets constraints and is concise, but lacks stronger surprise or specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the school pencil refuse to go outside during the blizzard? It was afraid it might get lost in the wood-storm.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the 'wood-storm' pun, but it's a bit forced and lacks strong surprise or specificity. The connection to the headline is weak, and the humor doesn't fully land."}

candidates.text: If you thought school was a blizzard, wait until you see 25 centimeters of it!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'blizzard' and 'school,' but it's a bit forced and lacks the punch of more surprising or specific humor."}
